questionHtml:
What is name of this compound applying IUPAC rules?

A.     E 1-bromo-1-chlorobut-1-ene

B.     Z 1-bromo-1-chlorobut-1-ene

C.     E 1-bromo-1-chloro-2-ethylethene

D.     Z 1-bromo-1-chloro-2-ethylethene

meta.title: What is name of this compound applying IUPAC rules? A. E 1-bromo-1-chlorobut-1-ene B. Z 1-bromo-1-chlorobut-1-ene C. E 1-bromo-1-chloro-2-ethylethene D. Z 1-bromo-1-chloro-2-ethyle
